title: NekoUI - Aru Animated Background
description: This is an extension for NekoUI.
body:
## About
An extension for NekoUI, compatible with versions from 1.0-release to the latest.

Dependencies : [NekoUI](https://modrinth.com/project/EZpbRipP)

## Preview
### Screenshot :
![Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dda7e5ad10f3acb266f06cf6d18d998f559e2a08.jpeg)
### Video :
<iframe width="1920" height="1080" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/e2OFG4IupzM" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## How To Use?
1. Download [NekoUI](https://modrinth.com/mod/nekoui) along with its [dependencies](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api), then place them in the mods folder.

2. Download the extension you want and put it in the resourcepacks folder.

3. Go to NekoUI settings to start using it.
